##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customFile/detail 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customFile/detail 
 ## 接口描述 
获取自定义档案详情 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"id","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"10","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"createTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileName","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileType","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"%20MULTI_LEVEL%E6%9C%89%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%0ASINGLE_LEVEL%E6%97%A0%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","maxLength":"10","label":"%E5%81%9C%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","desc":"%200-%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%EF%BC%8C1-%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fromApi","required":false,"la A1%B9%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EId","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"","desc":""}}],"open":false}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/api/v1/customFile/detail?id=10
### 请求示例
```json
{}
```
### 返回示例
```
{

    "message": "调用成功！",
    "data": {
        "createTime": 0,
        "customFileId": "string",
        "customFileName": "string",

         "status": "1",
```  

| 200        | 成功         | 无      |
